nasb.text: Zebulun was a people who despised their lives even to death, And Naphtali also, on the high places of the field.

esv.text: Zebulun is a people who risked their lives to the death; Naphtali, too, on the heights of the field.

cnv.text: 西布倫人是敢死的民族； 拿弗他利人在田野的高處，奮不顧身。

ccb.text: 但西布伦人和拿弗他利人却拼死鏖战沙场。
